Elsevier 2005

Androgen Receptors
The prostate, unlike other androgen-dependent organs, main-
tains its ability to respond to androgens throughout life. In the
penis, AR expression decreases to negligible rates at the completion
of puberty (Roehrborn et al, 1987; Takane et al, 1991a, 1991b).
Thus, despite high circulating levels of androgen, the adult penis
loses its ability for androgen-dependent growth. If the penis main-
tained high levels of ARs throughout life, presumably the organ
would grow until the time of death. In contrast, AR levels in the
prostate remain high throughout aging (Barrack et al, 1983; Rennie
et al, 1988). In fact, these data suggest that nuclear AR levels may
be higher in hyperplastic tissue than in normal control tissues. Age-
related increases in estrogen, as well as other factors, may increase
AR expression in the aging prostate, leading to further growth (or
to a decrease in cell death), despite decreasing levels of androgen
in the peripheral circulation and "normal" levels of DHT in the
prostate.

text: Dutasteride: 5αR type 1(皮膚肝臟)+ 5αR type 2(prostate stroma cell) inhibitor
1.限良性前列腺肥大且有阻塞症狀，經直腸超音波前列腺掃描 (TRUS of prostate) 或經腹部超音波測量(僅限無法實施直腸超音波前列腺掃描者)前列腺大於30mL或最大尿流速 (Qmax) 小於15 mL/sec之病人，前列腺特異抗原 (PSA) 高於正常參考值之病人，需經病理診斷無前列腺癌，無法接受切片檢查者，應於病歷詳載原因方可使用。(102/12/1)
2.服藥後第一年，每半年需作直腸超音波前列腺掃描或腹部超音波測量(僅限無法實施直腸超音波前列腺掃描者)或尿流速儀(uroflow-metry) 檢查，需證明前列腺有縮小或尿流速有增加，得繼續使用。

text: Minimal invasive therapy vs Laser P
Current MIST: I-TIND, AquaBeam, Urolift, Rezum, PAE
Also consider PSA level, health condition, economic condition, hospital facilities and patient’s preference
slides.ocr_text:
Minimal invasive therapy vs Laser P
• Current MIST: 1-TIND, AquaBeam, Urolift, Rezum, PAE
• Sexual outcomes(erectile/ejaculatory): Best(Urolift and Rezum)
• Functional outcomes(IPSS/QoL/Qmax)：Best(HoLEP/Bipolar)
• Complications(UUI/dysuria/stricture)：Highest(HoLEP)
• Retreatment rate: Lowest(HoLEP), Highest(Urolift)
• Catheterization time: Longest(Rezum), No need(PAE/I-TIND)
Also consider PSA level, health condition, economic condition,
hospital facilities and patient's preference

text: hypoosmotic的水持續灌入venous plexus的斷端, 造成fluid overload, hypo-osmolality和acute dilutional hyponatremia ([Na]≦120 mEq/l),繼而造成 neurologic and vital signs changes:
Neurologic change: Confusion, nausea, vomiting, visual changes

Height of the fluid: 60 cm above the patient(這高度每高10cm多吸收兩倍的水)

slides.ocr_text:
TUR syndrome
•Incidence: 0.8%~2.5% (2%).
•hypoosmotic的水持續灌人venous plexus的斷端，造成fluid overload,hypo-
osmolality和acute dilutional hyponatremia (INal三120mEq/1),繼而造成
neurologic and vital signs changes:
• Neurologic change: Confusion, nausea, vomiting, visual changes
• Vital signs change: hypertension, tachypnea, bradycardia
• Risk factors:
• Larger glands (>45g)
• Longer op time (> 90 minutes)
• Open venous sinus
• Capsular perforation
• High-pressure irrigation ( > 40cm H20)
•Smoking history
•Height of the fluid: 60 cm above the patient(這高度每高10cm多吸收兩倍的水）
•治療：盡快結束手術,diuresis,hypertonic saline administration

Bipolar transurethral (plasmakinetic) enucleation of the prostate has a favourable peri-operative safety 1b
profile and demonstrates similar mid- to long-term safety compared to TURP.

TUIP VS TURP (EAU)
Summary of evidence
Transurethral incision of the prostate shows similar efficacy and safety to M-TURP for treating
moderate-to-severe LUTS secondary to BPO in men with prostates < 30 mL.
No case of TUR-syndrome has been recorded, the risk of bleeding requiring transfusion is negligible
and retrograde gjaculation rate is significantly lower after TUIP, but the re-operation rate is higher
compared to M-TURP.
IThe choice between TUIP and TURP should be based primarily on prostate volume (< 30 mL and
30-80 mL suitable tor TuP and TURP, respectively).

Open prostatectomy (EAU)
Summary of evidence
LE
Open prostatectomy is an effective and durable procedure for the treatment of LUTS/BPO, but it is the 1b
most invasive surgical method.
Open prostatectomy shows similar short- and mid-term efficacy to B-TUEP and HoLEP for treating
1a
moderate-to-severe LUTS secondary to BPO in patients with large prostates.
Open prostatectomy has a less favourable peri-operative safety profile compared to B-TUEP and
1a
HoLEP.
The long-term functional results of OP are comparable to HoLEP.
1
™wo meta-analyses evaluated the overall safety of OP performed via a transvesical approach vs.
B-TUEP and HoLEP [338, 339]. Operation time did not differ significantly between OP and B-TUEP, but was
significantly shorter for OP compared to HoLEP. Catheterisation and hospitalisation time were significantly
onger for OP, which was also associated with mere blood transtusions. There were no sighiicant ditferences
regarding other complications. There was no significapt difference in IIEF-5 at three, six, twelve and 24-months
follow-up.

text: Sleep efficiency: 實際上睡著的時間/躺在床上的時間 (85%以上算正常)
Sleep latency: 躺在床上還沒睡著的時間 (30分鐘以內為正常)
Sleep latency> 30分 造成大於兩倍的死亡風險, efficiency < 80% 約兩倍的死亡風險
睡覺兩階段: Rapid eye movement (REM) and non-rapid eye movement (NREM)
NREM: 約75% 的總睡眠時間, 再分成四階段
Stage 1: transition from wakefulness to sleep
Stages 3 and 4: deep, restorative sleep or slow-wave sleep (SWS)
The normal sleep cycle alternates between stages 1 and 4 of NREM and REM sleep
每次睡眠約包含6個cycles, 一開始SWS為主, 後期REM為主
從REM醒來是比較好的, 從SWS醒來會無精打采
第一次nocturia通常在睡著後2-3小時=> SWS被打斷 => QoL下降
睡覺時間少於6小時或大於8小時=> metabolic syndrome 風險上升
Nocturia affects sleep efficiency and sleep latency.
總之, nocturia as a risk factor for future development of both metabolic syndrome and early mortality

High alcohol intake, but also total abstention from alcohol has been associated with
a higher risk of PCa and PCa-specific mortality [43J. A meta-analysis shows a dose-
response relationship with Pca 144]
A weak correlation between high intake of protein from dairy products and the risk of
PCa was tound [45].
No association between intake of long-chain omega-3 poly-unsaturated fatty acids
and PCa was found [46J . A relation between intake of fried foods and risk of PCa may
exist [47].
A trend towards a favourable effect of tomato intake (mainly cooked) and lycopenes on
PCa incidence has been identified in meta-analyses [48, 49]. Randomised controlled
trials comparing lycopene with placebo did not identify a significant decrease in the
lincidence of PCa [50).
A meta-analysis did not show an association between red meat or processed meat
consumption and PCa 151].
Phytoestrogen intake was significantly associated with a reduced risk of PCa in a
meta-analysis 52).
Total soy food intake has been associated with reduced risk of PCa, but also with
increased risk of advanced disease 153, 54].
A U-shaped association has been observed, with both low- and high vitamin-D
concentrations being associated with an increased risk of PCa, and more strongly for
high-grade disease 154,55]
Vitamin E/Selenium An inverse association of blood, but mainly nail selenium levels (reflecting long-term
exposure) with aggressive PCa have been found [56, 571. Selenium and Vitamin E
supplementation were, however, found not to affect PCa incidence (581.

禁忌: high risk of extracapsular disease (cT2c/cT3, Gleason grade > 3)
可考慮 externally validated nomogram, intra-operative frozen-section or pre-operative mpMRI去評估是否能保留神經
術後Erectile function取決於age, pre-op erectile function, NVB的保留
PDE5 inhibitors in penile rehabilitation remains controversial
術後Incontinence取決於保留ext.sphincter和長度, bladder neck和NVB(機制不明)
NCCN仍不建議neoadjuvant ADT before surgery:
好處:downstaging, decreased positive margins,lower incidence of positive LNs
無法 improve PSA relapse-free survival or CSS
Retzius sparing(incontinence恢復較快, 2017 EU paper)
slides.ocr_text:
Radical prostatectomy概論
•RARP or LRP vs. open RP outcome(Cochrane review)
• Oncological, urinary function and sexual function outcomes沒有差異
•Nerve-sparing surgery
•禁忌：high risk of extracapsular disease (cT2c/cT3, Gleason grade > 3)
•可考慮externally validated nomogram, intra-operative frozen-section or pre-
operative mpMRi去評估是否能保留神經
•術後Erectile function取決於age， pre- op erectile function, NVB的保留
• PDE5 inhibitors in penile rehabilitation remains controversial
•術後Incontinence取決於保留ext.sphincter和長度，bladder neck和NVB（機制不明）
•NCCN仍不建議neoadjuvant ADT before surgertguus sparingincontinence妆復較快，2017 EU paper)
•好處：downstaging, decreased positive margins,lower incidence of positive LN's
•無法 improve PSA relapse-free survival or Css

text: 身體會躺成Trendelenburg position: 頭低腳高, 為了避免腸道影響手術視野
Cardiovascular: Venous return會上升增加preload, Cardiac output和MAP上升, Blood pooling in legs下降
Pulmonary: 橫隔膜對肺臟造成壓迫使functional respiratory capacity及compliance下降及peak airway pressure上升
下肢會架成Lithotomy position: 腳打開, 方便Foley進出
Lithotomy position會導致, 特別是新手之minimal invasive surgery
與下肢灌流減少和ischemia有關 (腳架太高、手術時間長及hypotension都是因素)
擺位時腳踝的Dorsiflexion 要避免, 減壓設備(cushioning)
長時間手術建議lowering the limbs every 2 hours
slides.ocr_text:
RP姿勢相關問題
•身體會躺成Trendelenburg position: 頭低腳高，為了避免腸道影響手術視野
。對生理方面的影響：
• Cardiovascular: venous return會上升增加preload, Cardiac output和
MAP上升,Blood pooling in legs 下降
Pulmonary:橫隔膜對肺臟造成壓迫使functional respiratory capacity及
compliance 下降及peak airway pressure 上升
•下肢會架成Lithotomy position ：腳打開，方便Foley進出
•可能產生下肢Compartment Syndrome
• Lithotomy position會導致，特別是新手之minimal invasive surgery
•與下肢灌流減少和ischemia有關（腳架太高、手術時間長及
hvpotension都是因素）
•擺位時腳踝的Dorsiflexion 要避免，減壓設備(cushioning)
•長時間手術建議lowering the limbs every 2 hours
•可做doppler與DVT來診斷

text: NVB 走在 prostatic fascia, levator ani fascia, 以及 Denonvilliers fascia之間
但理想上是要從 Intra-fascia 才能做到 full nerve sparing (?), high risk for positive surgical margin

Campbell : To avoid bleeding from the capsular arteries and veins, some surgeons dissect beneath the prostatic fascia (intrafascial dissection). Because this plane is directly on the prostatic parenchyma, the risk for positive surgical margins is high. For this reason, this approach should never be used.

Injury to the cavernous nerve results in erectile dysfunction.

If a patient has had upfront MRI followed by systematic and targeted biopsies there is no

Strategy of surveillance
Repeat biopsies should be performed at least once every three years for ten years.
In case of prostate-specific antigen progression or change in digital-rectal exam-ination or
MRI findings, do not progress to active treatment without a repeat biopsy.

slides.ocr_text:
6.3.3.3
Recommendations for the management of high-risk localised disease*
Recommendations
Expectant management
offer watchful waiting to asymptomatic patients with life expectancy < 10 years.
Radical prostatectomy (RP)
Offer RP to selected patients as part of potential multi-modal therapy.
Extended pelvic Jymph node dissection (PLND)
In patients undergoing a lymph node dissection you should perform an extended PLND.
Do not perform a frozen section of nodes during RP to decide whether to proceed with, or
abandon, the procedure.
Radiotherapeutic treatment
Offer intensity-modulated radiotherapy (IMRT)/volumetric modulated arc therapy (VMAT)
plus image-guided radiotherapy (IGRT), with a total dose of 76-78 Gy or moderate
hypofractionation (60 Gy/20 fx in 4 weeks or 70 Gy/28 fx in 6 weeks), in combination with
long-term androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) (two to three years).
Hong
EAUVS NCCN

Offer RP to patients with cNo disease as part of multi-modal therapy.

In patients undergoing a lymph node dissection you should perform an extended PLND.
Radiotherapeutic treatments

modulated arc therapy (VMAT) plus image-guide radiation therapy in combination with long.

Flutamide (Drogenil, Eulexin): Short half-life (6 hrs), 250 mg TID

Bicalutamide (Casodex): Long half-life (1 week), daily use
Monotherapy (50 mg QD) – inferior to castration
High dose (150 mg QD) – equivalent to medical / surgical castration
In low-risk, localized CaP, Bicalutamide increase overall mortality !!

GI toxicity [diarrhea, more common in flutamide]

text: 為什麼Abiraterone會造成aldosterone濃度下降？又為什麼會造成低血鉀,高血壓和fluid overload？

text: Enzalutamide + Leuprolide VS Enzalutamide alone VS Leuprolide alone in High-Risk Biochemically Recurrent Prostate Cancer
Enzalutamide + leuprolide acetate vs. leuprolide acetate --> statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvement in MFS (HR: 0.42, 95% CI: 0.30 – 0.61, p<0.0001).
also demonstrated an OS improvement (HR: 0.59, 95% CI: 0.38 – 0.90, p=0.0142).

•113 年8月1日台灣健保給付規範修訂條文對於給付條件和給付上限進行修正：
，給付條件：針對治療高風險轉移性的去勢敏感性前列腺癌(mCSPC)的新型賀爾蒙藥品 (NHT)如
apalutamide 、abiraterone 、enzalutamide 及 darolutamide 之其中一項新申請條件統一為「骨骼掃描出現
三個(含）以上病灶且至少其中一處以上為非脊柱及非骨盆腔轉移」。
，給付上限，：NHT 之給付上限時間自24 個月延長至 36 個月（包含apalutarnide 、abiraterone、
enzalutamide) 。
•過去健保資料庫分析中約 1/3 服藥病人可用滿 24 個月，使用期滿而停藥病人有機會因健保條文修訂而受
惠，且未來新申請之病人亦可獲得健保給付三年用藥。然而健保給付調整之新申請條件並未提供現階段已用
藥期滿兩年而停藥患者之復申請方式，治療兩年後停藥之患者亦不適用原本健保續申請條件。
•有鑑於此，本會針對先前因健保給付受限而停藥之患者，在健保給付規範擴增用藥時間後如何申請復用進
行共識討論，本會共識決議如下：
1. 健保NHT 24 個月限制停藥患者之復申請，不受限於原續用規範，三個月內影像學無惡化，即符合可
再續用 12個月的NHT 條件。
2. 復申請成功者，續用比照現行健保續用條文。

text: ENZA不需肝腎功能調整劑量
初期症狀（前驅期）——類似感冒
咽喉痛、咳嗽、倦怠、食慾不振
眼睛紅、畏光、流淚（結膜炎）
👉 常在 皮膚症狀出現前 1–3 天 發生
紅斑、丘疹，逐漸融合為 大片扁平紅疹
表皮出現 水泡、脫皮、壞死性糜爛
口腔潰瘍、唇部潰爛結痂
眼睛疼痛、紅腫，甚至角膜潰瘍
陰莖龜頭紅腫、疼痛、潰瘍
Nikolsky sign 陽性：用力摩擦皮膚表面 → 表皮剝離
燒燙傷樣外觀：大片紅斑脫皮，類似 second-degree burn
體表面積累及 >10% 為 SJS，>30% 為 TEN

text: ADT plus docetaxel (75 mg/m2 of BSA Q3W *6 cycles) vs ADT alone in mCSPC
mCSPC 的病人收進來再分high volume和low volume(median survival reached)
≥4 bone lesions with ≥1 beyond the vertebral bodies and pelvis
Overall survival was 13.6 months longer (in high volume, 17 months longer, in low volume, median survival not reached且not significant)
Time to clinical progression was 13.2 months longer (low volume not significant)
Time to CRPC status was 8.5 months longer (low volume not significant)
Doce side effects: fatigue, neuropathy, stomatitis, diarrhea, neutropenia, fever
slides.ocr_text:

slides.ocr_text:
AMPLITUDE: Conclusions
•The AMPLITUDE trial met its primary end point of rPFS, with likely greatest
benefit in patients with BRCA alterations
• Improvements in rPFS are supported by a statistically significant benefit in
time to symptomatic progression and a trend toward improved os
• The safety profile of niraparib + AAP was consistent with that previously
observed in the MAGNITUDE trial,1 with a ≤5% increase in patients
discontinuing treatment due to toxicity than in those receiving placebo
• AMPLITUDE supports early genomic testing and niraparib + AAP as a new
treatment option for patients with mCSPC and HRR gene alterations
1. Chi kN.J Clin Oncol. 2023;41:3339-3351.

nmCRPC 健保給付新條文，9/1生效
。治療高風險非轉移性去勢抗性攝護腺癌(high risk nmCRPC ） 的成年男性。
②須經事前審查核准後使用。
® 初次申請時需檢附病理報告、使用雄性素去除療法紀錄，系列PSA 和睪固酮數據，三個月內影像報告證明
無遠端轉移。
④ ECOG 分數須≤1。
⑤ PSA doubling time ≤10 個月，PSA 倍增之時間，應依線性回歸模型計算，且其參數取得雷基於下列原則：
（1) 至少三個連續 PSA 測量值 且各測量值皆≥0.2 ng / ml (最高的 PSA 值必須＞1.0 ng/ml)。
21應包含先前 ADT 治療期間的測量值，且最少一測量值為最近3 個月內測得之 PSA數值。
(3) 第一個和最後一個 PSA 測量值間隔需≥8週，但≤12個月。
。 每了個月需再次申請，申請之療程以 了 個月為限。再次申請時，有PSA progression 者，需檢附影像學報告，
若影像學報告證實轉移，則需停藥;無 PSA progression 者，則每6個月需檢附影像學報告，若影像學報告證實轉移，
則需停藥。
註：PSA progression 定義為：PSA下降達最低值(nadir)後，出現PSA值上升較 nadir ≥ 25%，
PSA≥2.0 ng/ml，並於至少 了 週後，再次抽血確認 PSA 值有上升趨勢。
② 病人終生僅能接受一種治療攝護腺癌的新型荷爾蒙藥品 (darolutamide 、abiraterone、apalutamide 和
enzalutamide) 且僅能擇一給付，無效後不再給付其他新型荷爾蒙藥品，且除非出現嚴重不耐受反應導致必須
永久停止治療的情況，不得互換。
fony

得；第一個與最後一個 PSA 測量值需間隔 ≧ 8週，但 ≦ 12個月。

comorbidities, genomic profile, extent of disease and patient preference.
loffer abiraterone or enzalutamide to patients previously treated with one or two lines of
Strong
chemotherapy.
Offer cabazitaxel to patients previously treated with docetaxel.
Strong
offer cabazitaxel to patients previously treated with docetaxel and progressing within twelve Strong
months of treatment with abiraterone or enzalutamide.
loffer 177Lu-PSMA-617 to pre-treated mCRPC patients with one or more metastatic lesions,
strong
Ihighly expressing PSMA (exceeding the uptake in the liver) on the diagnostic radiolabelled
PSMA PET/CT scan.

text: 一線可以選擇NHT 或 docetaxel, 二線則交換, 三線 caba 或 rechallenge doce(mCSPC用過的情況)
(口試不要這些，包含一開始的repeat image, Mets Bx, gene, 其他治療bone antiresorptive agent, RT to mets, supportive 都要講)
核醫: Ra 223在有症狀的骨轉移且排除visceral mets可以使用(cat 1.) => 要監控CBC
核醫: Lu-177 PSMA 617在三線且PSMA positive可以用(cat 1.)
標靶藥物: Olaparib (HRRm) 及 Rucaparib (BRCA1/2) 特殊gene mutation (Ola 有Cat 1.)
I/O: Sipu-T是從病人血液中提取APC cell,用PAP(Pca cell的antigen)培養, 成為對抗Pca cell的APC。需用在無症狀或輕度症狀、無visceral mets、餘命>6M、ECOG 0-1、非small cell。在第一線是Cat 1。(用過C/T的病人可以用）
I/O: Pembro 要有MSI-H, dMMR或TMB>10, Tumor Mutational Burden:每百萬鹼基對中的突變數；高突變負荷（≥10）意味可能有更多新抗原，提升免疫治療效果
Chemo: Cabazitaxel用在第三線或不適用Doce的情況(周邊神經病變)，25mg和20mg沒有survival差異, 但後者副作用低很多。
Chemo: Mitoxantrone AE較少但無survival benefit, 用於palliative(fail doxetaxel後之二or三線)

一線可以選擇NHT 或 docetaxel,二線則交換，三線caba 或 rechallenge doce(mCSPC

antiresorptive agent, RT to mets, supportive 都要講）

•核醫：Ra223在有症狀的骨轉移且排除visceral mets可以使用(cat 1.)二>要監控CBC

•標靶藥物：Olaparib (HRRm）及 Rucaparib (BRCA1/2)特殊gene mutation (Ola 有Cat

text: Sipuleucel-T 是第一個被美國 FDA 准許使 用在solid tumor的癌症疫苗(cancer vaccine),在攝護腺癌主要用於mCRPC
治療機轉:藉由體外刺激培養出來的樹突細胞(Dendritic cells)來彌補體內機能失調的樹突細胞。

Sipuleucel-T 製作時,周邊血液單核細胞(Peripheral blood mononuclear cells)須與 PAP2024 蛋白一起培養,藉此使分泌前列腺酸性磷酸酶(Target antigen prostatic acid phosphatase)的癌細胞與顆粒球巨噬細胞聚落刺激因子(Granulocyte-macrophage colony-stimulating factor; GM-CSF)產生連結。
No prior docetaxel/no prior NHT or s/p docetaxel mCRPC, asymptomactic or minimally symptomatic, no liver mets, life expectancy >6m, ECOG<2

FDAapproves Novartis radioligand therapy Pluvicto@for earlier use
before chemotherapy in PSMA-positive metastatic castration-resistant
prostate cancer
Mar 28.2025
• On March 28,2025, the U.S. FDA expanded the approval of Pluvicto (177Lu-PSMA-617) for treating mCRPC. This decision marks a major
milestone in the management of advanced prostate cancer, particularly tor patients who have imited treatment options.
• This expanded approval is based on Phase Il PSMAfore trial demonstrating its efficacy in improving progression-free survival (PFS) and
overall survival (OS) in patients with advanced disease.
V Reduced the risk of radiographic progression or death by 59% (HR=0.41; 95% Cl: 0.29,0.56;p<0.0001) compared to a change in ARPlin
patients with PSMA-positive mCRPC after treatment with ARPI therapy.
The final overall survival (OS) analysis numerically favored Pluvicto, with a hazard ratio of 0.91 (95% Cl: 0.72, 1.14), but was not
statistically significant. The OS analysis was confounded by the high rate of patients who crossed over from the control arm to Pluvicto
(60.3%). When adjusted for crossover, the Os hazard ratio was 0.59 (95% C: 0.38, 0.91) with the inverse probability of censoring weighting
(IPCW) method.
NOVARTIS

text: PARP（Poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase）是一類參與 DNA 單股斷裂（Single Strand Breaks, SSBs）修復的酶。當 DNA 發生單股斷裂時，PARP1 會被招募到損傷部位並促進修復
→ PARP inhibitor 會抑制 PARP 的活性，使得 DNA 的單股斷裂無法被修復。這些未修復的 SSBs 會在 DNA 複製時轉化為更危險的雙股斷裂（DSBs）。
在正常細胞中，DSBs 可以透過同源重組修復（HR repair）機制修復。但某些癌細胞（Ex: BRCA1 或 BRCA2 突變的細胞）缺乏有效的 HR 修復功能。
→ PARP 被抑制 + HR 修復功能缺失 = 癌細胞無法修復 DNA 損傷 → 細胞死亡。
slides.ocr_text:

促進修復
PARPinhibitor 會抑制PARP的活性，使得 DNA 的單股斷裂無法被修復。這些末
修復的 sSBs 會在 DNA 複製時轉化為更危險的雙股斷裂（DSBs）。
在正常細胞中，DSBs 可以透過同源重組修復( HR repair）機制修復。但某些癌細
胞（Ex:BRCA1 或 BRCAZ 突變的細胞）缺乏有效的HR 修復功能。
＞PARP被抑制＋ HR 修復功能缺失 =癌細胞無法修復 DNA損傷 ＞細胞死亡。

The majority of patients can keep taking Olaparib
for as long as they receive efficacy benefit

Tolerability data from PROfound are presented for the overall population, including BRCA1/2, ATM and 12 other HRR mutations. LYNPARZA should only be prescribed in the appropriate indicated population.1

*AEs leading to death in the LYNPARZA arm were pneumonia (n=3), cardiopulmonary failure (n=2), acute cardiac failure, Budd-Chiari syndrome, intestinal diverticulum, neutropenia, septic shock, sudden death, spinal stenosis and urinary retention (all n=1). AEs leading to death in the control arm were pneumonia (n=2), cardiac failure, arterial
thrombosis, pleural effusion, duodenal ulcer perforation and death (all n=1).
‡At the final OS DCO, median duration of treatment was 7.6 months in the olaparib arm and 3.9 months in the control arm
AE=adverse event; CTCAE=Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events; HRR=homologous recombination repair; NHA=new hormonal agent.

text: EAU:睪固酮達去勢濃度：< 50 ng/dL 或 1.7 nmol/L，且同時符合下列其一
a. Biochemical progression：PSA 至少相隔 一週的三次連續上升，相較於nadir出現 兩次 ≥50% 的增加，且一次PSA > 2 ng/mL。
b. 影像學進展（Radiological progression）：出現 ≥2 個新骨轉移病灶 or  >= 1 個 soft tissue lesion
EAU: PSA ≥ 0.2 ng/mL and a second, confirmatory PSA ≥ 0.2 ng/mL.
NCCN:undetectable PSA after RP with a subsequent detectable PSA that increases on ≥2 determinations (PSA recurrence) or increases to PSA >0.1 ng/mL.

text: 3. 去勢療法無效的轉移性攝護腺癌 (mCRPC):
(1) 併用 abiraterone 及 prednisone 或 prednisolone，用於具 germline 或 somatic BRCA 1/2 致病性或疑似致病性突變且尚未接受化學治療
未曾使用新型荷爾蒙藥品 (abiraterone、apalutamide、darolutamide 和 enzalutamide) 治療前列腺癌。
於 mCRPC 階段使用 abiraterone 治療未超過 4 個月且使用期間未惡化。
不論病人處於轉移或非轉移的狀態下，新型荷爾蒙藥品 (abiraterone、apalutamide、darolutamide 和 enzalutamide)，及 olaparib
與 abiraterone 併用，終生僅能接受一種治療，且除非出現嚴重不耐受反應導致必須永久停止治療，不得互換。
(2) 須經事前審查核准後使用，每 3 個月需再次申請：
初次申請時需檢附 germline or somatic BRCA 1/2 突變檢測報告，且需符合全民健康保險藥品給付規定之通則十二。
申請時需檢附病理報告、使用雄性素去除療法紀錄及系列 PSA 和睪固酮數據。
再申請時若 PSA 值下降未超過治療前的 50%以上，則需停藥。
下降達最低值後之持續追蹤出現PSA 較最低值上升50%以上且PSA ≧2ng/ml，則需停藥，但影像學證據尚無疾病進展者，可以繼續使用。
Olaparib 每日最多使用 4 粒。
